type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: I used updated versions of the calculation spreadsheets this year compared to last year, which may have affected how the emissions were calculated.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Last year for the 'Boiler Heat Input' I used our wood boiler maximum capacity (which was not indicative of production) instead of using the total production output of the boiler divided by the boiler efficiency (which is the method I used this year to better represent emissions from the boiler).
Also, we increased natural gas production, and reduced bunker #6 oil production.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Last year for the ‘Boiler Heat Input’ I used our wood boiler maximum capacity (which was not indicative of production) instead of using the total production output of the boiler divided by the other efficiency (which is the method I used this year to better represent emissions from the boiler). Also, we increased natural gas production, and reduced bunker #6 oil production.

reasonsForNoActivities.en: Activities were implemented in a previous year; additional activities are either unnecessary or unfeasible at this time

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: A Climate Change Action Plan has been developed and is being implemented. Concurrently, an Energy Management Program is striving for increased efficiencies. We are currently renewing our renewable infrastructure as well.
